_comment: Per-scene golden hashes + Hamming-distance tolerances for the visual gate. Visual captures freeze renderer animation with visualGatePhase so the Hamming budget measures real palette/layout drift instead of frame-timing variance from hearth flicker, dust, breath, or particles. Re-capture is still deliberate and human-reviewable; verify should stay at 0 Hamming distance on a stable renderer, with toleranceBits reserved for browser/OS antialiasing noise and true-positive drift headroom.
